calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-23-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-23-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR. Lois Jones.
Thomas Wright, Esq. for Plaintiff, Tipton Management also present is property manager, Robert Flores. Defendant, Keishana Johnson present in pro per.
Parties met in chambers and reached a settlement by written stipulation (see Scanned document).
All parties agreed and signed the stipulation for judgment in open court.
Stipulation for judgment filed.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
